description: ArgonGuard authoritative reason-code enumeration. All four implementations MUST emit these exact strings. SPEC.md prose and all language test suites defer to this file.

MalformedHash.description: The encoded string cannot be strictly parsed as a PHC argon2id string.

UnsupportedAlgorithm.description: Parsed but algorithm is not argon2id, and no legacy verifier claimed the string.

PolicyViolation.description: Valid argon2id PHC string whose parameters fall outside the verification policy (OWASP frontier floor, ceiling, p==1, v==19, no keyid/data), and no legacy verifier claimed it.

InvalidInput.description: The password input violates the input canonicalization rules (UTF-8 byte-length 1..1024, no NUL, well-formed Unicode).

UnsupportedEnvironment.description: The runtime environment cannot provide argon2id (primarily PHP built without argon2id and without ext-sodium).
